import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let parts = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut a = match parts.get(0)
when Some(s)
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
when None
  0
end
mut b = match parts.get(1)
when Some(s)
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
when None
  0
end

while b != 0
  let t = b
  b = a % b
  a = t
end
